headline: Acme Chain Launches Audited Layer-2 Network for Sub-Cent Transactions
description: Acme Chain today announced the mainnet launch of its zk-rollup Layer-2, independently audited and live across three exchanges.
body: SINGAPORE — Acme Chain today announced the mainnet launch of its zero-knowledge Layer-2 network, bringing transaction costs below one cent while preserving Ethereum-grade security. The network has completed two independent security audits and is live across three major exchanges at launch. "Cost has been the barrier to real on-chain adoption," said the CEO. The toolkit and bridge are available today.
